applies_when: User asks whether cross-border ecommerce suits them without sharing market or product info
User leaves a vague comment like how to start selling abroad
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague cross-border inquiry into usable market facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for target platform, country, product category, and biggest concern
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed route without facts
Jumping straight to ad spend or inventory
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我想做哪个平台、哪个国家站点、卖什么类目，以及更担心选品、物流还是本地化，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides market and product facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time doing cross-border ecommerce
User sounds unsure whether platform, independent store, or content-driven route fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive route first
items.safe_transition: 第一次做跨境先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把平台、站点、类目和最卡的环节理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and market, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about shipping time, tax, or warehouse choice
User worries delivery or customs will kill conversion
items.response_goal: Answer logistics concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be route and cost differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that market
avoid: Guaranteeing zero tax or ultra-fast delivery
items.safe_transition: 物流和税费确实会影响转化，我们可以先看你卖到哪个国家、想走海外仓还是直发，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If market and fulfillment facts are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about refunds, disputes, or platform rules
User worries after-sales will be too hard
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real after-sales setup, not just sold a growth promise.
do: Ask about platform, return expectations, and support capacity
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我做哪个平台、卖到哪个国家、以及更担心退货、拒付还是客服承接，我可以先帮你看更稳的方案。
items.handoff_suggestion: If service concerns are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed margins or rule loopholes in public comments
User discusses sensitive account or policy details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
avoid: Collecting risky compliance details in comments
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把平台和规则说太满，你把站点、类目和最卡的问题发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning buyer or seller asks about upgrading or reordering
User asks what changed this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a repeat-buy decision, not a fresh first-sale pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new versions or easier replenishment
Keep the tone familiar and light
avoid: Pretending every order cycle is identical
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次升级了什么、补货周期到了没有，再决定值不值得继续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
